what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel-memory attachment of type board_items, linking the attachment att-995c3b51 to the board item board://item-1fcfb08a and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
Target is a board:// URI pointing to item-1fcfb08a
standouts: absence of any payload or description beyond metadata
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Uses a board:// URI scheme for cross-system referencing
concerns: No payload or content body is present; the attachment's semantic value is not stored here
The referenced board item is not described or included, so the file is not self-explanatory
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that points a channel-memory item to a board item but carries no content of its own.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
What is the title or nature of board://item-1fcfb08a?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches what it does; it successfully records type, target, and timestamp but does not store the attached content itself.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a typed, timestamped association between a channel-memory artifact and a specific board item for later lookup or audit.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target an external board item is the most distinctive feature; otherwise it is a conventional metadata stub.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped edge between channel memory and a board item, preserving provenance and enabling cross-system traversal without embedding the target content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel-memory attachment metadata file of type board_items that links att-995c3b51 to board://item-1fcfb08a in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to record a provenance-tied reference from a channel-memory attachment to a board item.
